_README: Voice profile template for the humanizer. Copy this file to voices/{name}.json, fill in all fields, then pass --voice {name} to humanizer.py. The 'examples' field is the most important: include 5-10 real sentences written by the person, captured verbatim from their messages/posts. The more natural the examples, the better the LLM can match cadence.
name: your_voice_name
description: One-line description: role, location, writing style in plain English

traits.register: formal/casual/technical; describe tone and any signature quirks
traits.punctuation: describe comma usage, dashes, ellipses, exclamation marks
traits.formatting: does the person use bullets? headers? prose only? numbers?

avoids: AI-tell words the person would never say

examples: First real sentence written by this person verbatim.
Add more for better style matching.
